description:
Research boiling points for the solvents listed below on CAMEO Chemicals (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/), determine their distillation recovery order (lowest to highest boiling point), and identify the 'critical pair' (the two adjacent chemicals with the smallest temperature difference). 

Chemicals to analyze:
- Acetone
- Toluene
- Methyl Ethyl Ketone (2-Butanone)
- Isopropyl Alcohol (2-Propanol)
- Xylene (mixed isomers)

Create a report at /home/ga/Documents/distillation_schedule.txt formatted as follows, converting all temperatures to Celsius:

DISTILLATION RECOVERY SCHEDULE
================================

1. [Chemical Name] ([BP] C)
2. [Chemical Name] ([BP] C)
